description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

This facility opens when a "Heatstroke Special Alert" is issued. During the operation period from April 22, 2026 (Reiwa 8) to October 28, it will be activated when temperatures are exceptionally high and the heat index (WBGT) in Saitama Prefecture is forecast to reach 35 or higher the next day.

Multiple designated facilities are located throughout Hanno City, including the Citizen Activity Center, Library, Post Office, Administrative Center, Maruhiro Department Store, Museum, Welfare Center, and Gymnasium in various districts. Use is available during each facility's regular business hours; opening times vary by facility (weekdays only, Tuesday–Sunday only, etc.). Capacity is approximately 1–20 people depending on the facility.

When using a shelter, please follow staff instructions and keep noise to a minimum, as people may be in the middle of administrative procedures. Heatstroke Special Alerts are announced via disaster prevention radio, disaster prevention email, and the Ministry of the Environment website.

Inquiries: Health Center (042-974-3488)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/10102.html
